title: Content Calendar Ideas
description: A week of social media content ideas at a glance

cards.title: Monday: Motivation
cards.description: Share a quote or personal win to start the week strong.

cards.title: Tuesday: Tutorial
cards.description: Teach something in your niche. Quick tip or how-to thread.

cards.title: Wednesday: Behind the Scenes
cards.description: Show your workspace, process, or a day in your life.

cards.title: Thursday: Throwback
cards.description: Share a before/after, milestone, or lesson learned.

cards.title: Friday: Feature
cards.description: Highlight a tool, book, or creator you love.

cards.title: Saturday: Poll/Question
cards.description: Ask your audience something. Boost engagement.

cards.title: Sunday: Rest & Plan
cards.description: Reflect on the week. Tease what's coming next.
